_comment: Canonical report-column contract shared by the Python worker and the TS web app. Four places must agree on this set, and historically drifted (ADR-094 added `price` to the worker but not the web side, which broke the onboarder save-gate). Both suites pin against this fixture: worker/tests/test_synthesizer.py and web/scripts/check-report-columns-parity.test.mjs. If you add/remove a column, update profile.py:KNOWN_REPORT_COLUMNS, synthesizer.py:COLUMN_DEFS, schema.ts:KNOWN_REPORT_COLUMNS, report-columns.ts:REPORT_COLUMN_DEFS, the onboard_v1.txt available-columns list, AND this fixture together.
